title: cyperus congestus var. glandulifer
intro: Cyperus congestus var. glandulifer, also known as the glandular umbrella sedge, is a type of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus congestus var. glandulifer include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
